verbatim_response: Veridian has been solid for our reporting needs. The cohort module is genuinely useful when we use it. Main reason it's not a 9 or 10 is we haven't fully integrated it into our daily workflow yet — that's on us more than the product.
Does what it says it does. I mostly use it for pulling the weekly reports Kofi needs. Not sure I'd say it's become essential to my work the way some tools are.

Honestly I don't use it that often personally — my team handles the Veridian side of things. From what I've seen it covers our needs. We've been evaluating our tool stack more broadly this quarter so it's hard to say where things land long term.

Good tool. The API is reliable which matters a lot to me. Would love to see better documentation on the more advanced integration features — I've had to figure some of it out myself. Happy to give more detailed feedback if useful.
